feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDPOS, CDHDR, SM19, SM20 Logs Confirmation
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Share the following  logs for both application and database levels:

1.

Whether each of the above software have feature (Application & Database Level):
- When changes were made
- Who made those changes
- What data was changed
- Whether all changes are logged and not just the last changes
- Whether the audit trail is stored on server located in India
- Whether audit trail covers all type of transactions

(Change include creating new data, deleting, updating data)

We want =  Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

2. 

User IDs used for changes are assigned to each individual and that User IDs are not shared.

We want = Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

 

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: SAP Business One Delivery Note and Serialnumber History
entry.content:
Hello together,

i am working on an Integration for a Ticket System with SAP Business One. I already have some integrations working like syncing orders or invoices, which is all done via the B1 Service Layer Rest API.

I am stuck on a serialnumber search for delivery notes or invoices. It seems that there are not any options via the API so i tried fetching the data directly from the database.

What i am looking is something like the serial number transaction view. When you are in an delivery note you can go to serial transactions and see what and where that serialnumber was connected to.

I cannot replicate that via API or SQL.

This is the best i have done:

 

SELECT 
    OSRI.ItemCode,
	OSRI.ItemName,
    OSRI.IntrSerial,
    OSRI.SuppSerial,
    OSRI.CreateDate,
	OSRI.Direction,
    OSRI.BaseType,
    OSRI.BaseEntry,
    OSRI.BaseNum
FROM 
    OSRI
WHERE 
    OSRI.SuppSerial = 'MYSERIAL'
ORDER BY 
    OSRI.CreateDate

The least i would need is to find delivery notes on where a specifc serialnumber is linked to.

entry.title: Error 'cannot cancel document with a down payment that was drawn to invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are attempting to cancel a previously issued check that was not deposited by the vendor due to it being misplaced. Our intention is to cancel the original check and reissue a new one. However, when we try to cancel the check, we encounter the following error message:

"Cannot cancel a document with down payment that was drawn to an invoice."

Could you please advise on the appropriate steps to resolve this issue and proceed with reissuing the check?

entry.title: Issue with FTPO Adapter in Integration Framework 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working with Integration Framework 2.0 and encountering an issue when using the FTPO Adapter Type.

I am attempting to send an XML file from a local folder, using the FILI atom, to an SFTP server via the FTPO Adapter.

Please find below a description of the scenario:

  • Scenario Overview:

     

  • Structure of the XML file created in the local folder:

     

  • Inbound Atom (FILI): Connection is configured via SLD and tests successfully

     

  • FTPO Adapter Call in BizFlow

     

  • Outbound (Void)

     

After testing the scenario, the following results are shown in the Monitor window:

  • The status is "Completed"
    • However, the XML file is not transferred to the SFTP server.

 

  • When checking the BizIos1 details, the SFTP server parameters appear to be correctly mapped

     

  • The End BizFlow step appears to be empty

     

Additionally, I have verified the SFTP connection using FileZilla and WinSCP, and I am able to create and update files without any issues.

Could you please assist in identifying what might be going wrong?

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP Business One SLD Error
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I need your guidance, more than anything else now. Tried every possible thing from my end and now I need those solutions which I can't think about or I don't know.

Long short , I installed SAP in my local system , version SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.270) SP 2411  (64-bit), restored a database, made entries and the very next day , I saw these when I went for choosing company.

When went to access the service manager , it showed up like this.

All of a sudden in the very next day the entire thing went away. I need to know some way to troubleshoot and way to get back everything. How to check what happened and how to fix this?


Thank you

entry.title: BUDGET AUTORIZATIONS IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Good morning esteemed experts,

Is there a place where I can consult to view the query for condition 5=Deviation from Budget for authorization models? I would like to see the generation of a query to establish ranges in the same way that the authorization model does natively from the table WTM4. An inconsistency has been detected, and I want to validate if it is possible to visualize it. In this case, the deviation calculates, for example, all purchase orders, and I want to make the connection. Is it possible to see that native query?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA (10.00.280 FP2502) – Invalid Username or Password Issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have installed SAP Business One version for HANA (10.00.280) FP2502. However, when I attempt to log in to the SAP B1 client, I receive the following error:

"We are sorry... Invalid username or password."

To resolve this, I have already reviewed and attempted the solutions provided in the following SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3274346

  • SAP Note 3339938

  • SAP Note 3251679

Unfortunately, the issue persists. Has anyone encountered and successfully resolved this problem? Any guidance would be appreciated. (Screenshot is attached below)

Thank you in advance!

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN @richardduffy

entry.title: Error Encountered During GRPO Import with Batch Numbers in SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I encountered the following error while attempting to import a GRPO with batch numbers using the highlighted version:


Cannot add row without complete selection of batch/serial numbers65171

System Details
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.130) FP 2008 (64-bit)

Regards 

Manikandan Kannan

entry.title: Customer Check out report required from CCO machine
entry.content:
Dear Team,

A customer checkout report is required with the following data

  1. Customer Name

  2. Customer Phone Number

  3. CCO Invoice Number (from the CCO machine)

Note: All customers are one-time customers so all are not created in SAP Business one

Kindly provide the report at your earliest convenience.

entry.title: Duplicated Batch Item Cost
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm is it standard System behaviour and there is no way to change in Setup actual item cost is recalculated for Inventory Item in GRPO posted to a Duplicated Batch Number?  This Item is Managed by Batch and using Batch Inventory Item Valuation Costing Method.

Example, 

We need to input unique Batch Number in Goods Receipt PO to have independent item cost?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Connected License To Server is not Authenticated
entry.content: Hi guys, I'm having a problem connecting client to Server, I'm using SAP B1 2502 and getting the error "Connected License To Server is not Authenticated". I've opened all the necessary ports 40000, 40020, 50000, 8100, 60000

entry.title: MRP Wizard MSN5 table No Data
entry.content:
Hi All,

While creating Document through MRP wizard in Sap B1, Created documents(Purchase Order,Purchase Request) details are not listed in MSN5 table. Please let me know any configuration need to update if data need to save in that particular table.

entry.title: Auto-insert AR-Invoice data to linked server SQL table on manual or DI API entry Using SQL Triggers
entry.content:
Requirement: To insert newly created AR invoice data into a SQL table, either manually or via the DI API.
Solution Tried: Insert statement via PostTransactionNotification 
Test Result of PostTransactionNotification : Worked only with manual AR Invoice posting but failed with invoices posted via DI API.
Test Result of SQL Trigger: This works fine for the following requirement
Can we use SQL trigger on the OINV table to insert the data in a SQL table. If I move forward with this trigger,
What are the possible risks or issues associated with it?
NOTE: This must not be implemented using the DI API’s ActionSuccess handler.

entry.title: Web Client Extension Error 404 - React App with React Router
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to add tile extension to SAP B1 WebClient written in React.JS and it worked unless I added React Router functionality to it.

Now main page displays an error of 404. It is the problem with the address of a page, but I can't find a solution how to solve that. I added the 'homepage' tag as '.' to package.json like docs says but it didn't help.

If anyone knows the answer, please let me know. Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Business One Inventory Aging Report Document Price Logic
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you enlighten me how does the Inventory Aging Report gets the Amount if you selected the Document Price.

Base on SAP Help Portal https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/d5848e3985ba4130a115c6c3dfc4a22d.html

  • Document Price – The price per receipt document is used.

But when generating the report, it is not.

 

Regards,
Lean

entry.title: How to get a negative value in selection criteria of query report?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to get a negative value in the selection criteria of a query report?

Please see the sample below:

DECLARE @dayfrom AS INT
DECLARE @dayto AS INT
Select @dayfrom = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%0]' Select @dayfrom = '[%0]'
Select @dayto = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%1]' Select @dayto = '[%1]'

While executing this, we can add a negative sign and the report would should data as per selection criteria.

Ex. -10 & -20

Is it possible to make changes in the report so that the user enters a positive value but the query checks it for negative value, ex: in selection criteria user enters 10 and 20 but the result should display it based on  -10 and -20?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Cannot change Posting Date approved grpo draft
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

First, I used SAP Business One 10 PL 2011 on HANA DB

Second, I create Draft GRPO, and after that, when I try to change Posting Date, I find it not Editable like Due Date and Document Date (Attached)

But in another DB, I find Posting Date is Editable and can change it 

Can Anyone Support me in this case 

 

Regards

Kamal

entry.title: AUTO ADD CASH AMOUNT IN PAYMENT MEAN SAP BUSINESS ONE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I wanna add cash amount automatically in payment mean's cash tab while adding A/R Invoice + Payment document and dont want to see payment mean window after click on add document button. Can it be possible via Transaction Notification or formatted search that we can insert the document total amount in payment mean's cash total column?

Thanks & Kind Regards

Sohail Ahmed

entry.title: How to separate the string for a query column custom name into two lines?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this working simple example query in SAP Business One, which calls for all entries for a parameter (document number from all Sales Order documents) to be displayed in a column, which is then renamed:

SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "Document Number" FROM ORDR T0

Which displays a standard table with all the document numbers separated in rows for Sales Orders in a single column named "Document Number". 

My question is: how do I split the custom header string "Document Number" into two lines, so it reads

"Document

Number"

as the column name in the query result?

entry.title: Sales Order Line-Level MRP Recommendations - SAPB1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have received a requirement from our client regarding the MRP order recommendation process. The client would like MRP recommendations—specifically Purchase Requests (PR) or Purchase Orders (PO) to reflect child part requirements on a per-sales-order-line basis, rather than consolidating demand across multiple sales order lines.

Example Scenario:

In a sales order (SO123) with two line items for the same parent material, where the BOM contains a common child item:

Current behavior: MRP consolidates the total child part requirement (e.g., 30 units for RM1001) and generates a single PR or PO.

Client requirement: MRP should generate two separate recommendations (e.g., 20 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 001 and 10 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 002), maintaining clear traceability to each sales order line.

Thanks!!!
